title: sida rhombifolia var. scabrida
intro: Sida rhombifolia var. scabrida, also known as the prickly sida or hairy sida, is a variant of the sida rhombifolia plant species, belonging to the Malvaceae family of flowering plants. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sida rhombifolia var. scabrida include its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
